heading: Adjustment of overpayment of estimated income tax by corporation

children.heading: Time for filing
children.label: 1 Time for filing
children.text: A corporation may, after the close of the taxable year and on or before the 15th day of the fourth month thereafter, and before the day on which it files a return for such taxable year, file an application for an adjustment of an overpayment by it of estimated income tax for such taxable year. An application under this subsection shall not constitute a claim for credit or refund.

children.label: A
children.text: the estimated income tax paid by the corporation during the taxable year,

children.label: B
children.text: the amount which, at the time of filing the application, the corporation estimates as its income tax liability for the taxable year,

children.label: C
children.text: the amount of the adjustment, and

children.label: D
children.text: such other information for purposes of carrying out the provisions of this section as may be required by such regulations.

children.heading: Limited examination of application
children.label: 1 Limited examination of application
children.text: Within a period of 45 days from the date on which an application for an adjustment is filed under subsection (a), the Secretary shall make, to the extent he deems practicable in such period, a limited examination of the application to discover omissions and errors therein, and shall determine the amount of the adjustment upon the basis of the application and the examination; except that the Secretary may disallow, without further action, any application which he finds contains material omissions or errors which he deems cannot be corrected within such 45 days.

children.heading: Adjustment credited or refunded
children.label: 2 Adjustment credited or refunded
children.text: The Secretary, within the 45-day period referred to in paragraph (1), may credit the amount of the adjustment against any liability in respect of an internal revenue tax on the part of the corporation and shall refund the remainder to the corporation.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: No application under this section shall be allowed unless the amount of the adjustment equals or exceeds (A) 10 percent of the amount estimated by the corporation on its application as its income tax liability for the taxable year, and (B) $500.

children.heading: Effect of adjustment
children.label: 4 Effect of adjustment
children.text: For purposes of this title (other than section 6655), any adjustment under this section shall be treated as a reduction, in the estimated income tax paid, made on the day the credit is allowed or the refund is paid.

children.label: i
children.text: the tax imposed by section 11 or subchapter L of chapter 1, whichever is applicable, plus

children.label: ii
children.text: the tax imposed by section 55, plus

children.label: iii
children.text: the tax imposed by section 59A, over

children.label: B
children.text: the credits against tax provided by part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1.

children.label: A
children.text: the estimated income tax paid by the corporation during the taxable year, over

children.label: B
children.text: the amount which, at the time of filing the application, the corporation estimates as its income tax liability for the taxable year.

children.heading: Consolidated returns
children.label: d Consolidated returns
children.text: If the corporation seeking an adjustment under this section paid its estimated income tax on a consolidated basis or expects to make a consolidated return for the taxable year, this section shall apply only to such extent and subject to such conditions, limitations, and exceptions as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
